name: Mango Sticky Rice
description: : A beautiful dessert fusion of sweet and tropical flavors. It features a molded mound of traditional sticky rice drizzled with a rich coconut cream sauce, accompanied by a perfectly scored, juicy fresh yellow mango half.

name: Crispy Cheesy Chicken Burger
description: A towering, indulgent sandwich featuring a massive, ultra-crispy fried chicken thigh nestled between a toasted sesame seed bun. The chicken is smothered in a rich, melted cheese sauce and layered with fresh, crisp frilly green lettuce on a rustic wooden plate.

name: Cantobox Iced Coffee Creamer / Signature Latte
description: A refreshing, layered iced coffee beverage served in a cute, branded Cantobox cup. The drink showcases a beautiful gradient, starting with a creamy milk base at the bottom that smoothly blends into a rich, robust espresso layer, topped with a thick, velvety coffee foam.

name: Kare-Kareng Bagnet Lechon Kawali
description: A modern, plated twist on a Filipino classic. This dish features a rich, savory peanut sauce spread across a wooden platter, topped with perfectly crisped, deep-fried pork belly (bagnet style). It is served alongside a neat dome of white rice sprinkled with dried herbs, blanched bok choy, string beans, fried eggplant slices, and a side of savory bagoong (shrimp paste) to tie all the rich flavors together.

name: Signature Macchiato / Iced Caramel Latte
description: A beautifully layered espresso beverage served in a tall, elegant glass. Rich espresso cascades through cold, velvety milk and ice, creating striking, marbled dark streaks against a sweet caramel glaze drizzled along the inside of the glass.

name: Iced Citrus Chia Cooler
description: A vibrant, refreshing iced beverage served in a custom "Cantobox" illustrated cup. Features a bright citrus layer at the base, refreshing soda, a fresh lemon wheel, and a healthy sprinkle of nutrient-rich chia seeds floating throughout.

name: Inihaw na Liempo & Salted Egg Basket
description: A traditional Filipino comfort platter showcasing sweet-savory grilled pork belly (inihaw na liempo) with beautiful char marks. It is paired with two scoops of rice, a halved salted duck egg, a refreshing tomato and eggplant salad, and a wooden bowl of spiced vinegar for dipping.

name: Twin-Scoop Rice & Crispy Chicken Basket
description: A hearty platter presenting two perfect scoops of white rice garnished with herbs, accompanied by ultra-crispy, golden-fried chicken pieces. It comes complete with a side of zesty, finely chopped tomato and eggplant salsa, and a wooden bowl of creamy dipping sauce.

name: Elevated Crispy Liempo Kare-Kare Basket
description: A rustic wicker basket lined with brown paper, featuring a neat mound of white rice topped with a rich, savory peanut sauce. It is served with a thick slab of crispy, golden-brown pork belly (liempo), blanched bok choy, string beans, eggplant, a side of charred flatbread, and a vibrant pink house-made bagoong (shrimp paste).

name: Bacon & Baked Egg Pastry Boats
description: Thick, hollowed-out slices of toasted artisanal bread baked to a crisp. Each "boat" holds a perfectly cooked whole egg with a soft yolk, loaded with smoky chopped bacon bits and a garnish of dried green herbs.

name: Golden Garlic Butter Buns (To-Go)
description: Two of the signature cream-cheese-stuffed garlic buns tucked neatly into clear, clamshell takeout containers lined with brown parchment paper, showing off their glossy, herb-crusted tops.

name: Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Buns (Platter)
description: A batch of freshly baked, pull-apart brioche buns cooling on parchment paper. The buns are deeply scored into segments, overflowing with a sweet and savory cream cheese filling, and glazed with a rich, herb-flecked garlic butter.

name: Cheesy Paprika Chicken Rice Bowls
description: Twin eco-friendly paper bowls packed with seasoned, vibrant orange rice. The rice is topped with golden chunks of crispy fried chicken, entirely smothered in a thick, velvety cheese sauce and dusted with a smoky pop of paprika and fresh parsley.

name: Fudgy Cocoa Crinkle Cookies
description: Thick, soft-baked chocolate crinkle cookies with a rich, fudgy interior. Each cookie is heavily dusted with a snow-like layer of powdered sugar and individually wrapped in charming, vintage-style bakery wax paper.

name: Cookies & Cream Frappé Duo
description: Two decadent, ice-blended cookies-and-cream milkshakes served in clear plastic cups with cardboard sleeves. Each drink is piled high with a mountain of whipped cream and generously topped with chunky, crushed chocolate sandwich cookie bits.

name: Classic Caramel Almond Waffle
description: A golden-brown, crispy Belgian waffle served on a minimalist white ceramic plate. It is beautifully layered with a generous ring of whipped cream, a scoop of smooth vanilla ice cream, and a scattering of toasted almond flakes, all finished with a rich drizzle of warm caramel syrup.
